title: Jujutsu Craft (by Luke)
description: Adds Cursed Techniques and Cursed Energy to your world! Has a handful of Cursed Techniques you can use, (VERY BUGGY or can be, I barely tested it lot but enjoy!)
body: Obviously based off of JJK, it has the following Cursed Techniques! Ten Mobs (Megumi), Sugar Manipulation (Rin), Extinguishment Technique (Hana/Angel), Boogie Woogie (Todo), Projection Sorcery (Naoya), Cursed Speech (Toge), Painkillers (Aruta), Explosive Flesh (Iori), Infinity (Gojo), Six Eyes (Gojo), Star Rage (Yuki), Mythical Beast Amber (Kashimo), Soul Dismantle (Yuji), Black Flash At Will (Yuji), Paralysing Gaze (Ranta), Missiel Fists (Jinichi)/ It also has a few other items like ways to increase your physical hearts and soul hearts, and Split Soul Katana, Technique Confiscation (to remove your technique) and a Student ID Card. Can't wait to add more to this mod in the future!!
